text:
The Saloma Mall (サロマデパート, Saroma Depāto—lit. "Saroma Department Store") is a mall in Yorknew City. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 12, Chapter 110 

Overview

The Saloma Mall is specifically located in the city's downtown. 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

Half of the Phantom Troupe members take the Castor Line to Lipa Station while they are unknowingly tailed by Killua (in the last car) and Melody (in the same car). Melody continues to follow them while pretending to read a book and eventually tells Killua that the Troupe members got off. Killua calls Kurapika and tells them their location, adding that the Troupe members are heading for the Saloma Mall exit. Kurapika then realizes that it's in the direction of the Hotel Beitacle. 

Trivia

The name of the mall is transliterated as Saloma Department Store in the Crunchyroll version/translation.
